Package com.shoppingcart

Class Product

java.lang.Object
com.shoppingcart.Product
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable
public class Product
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable
Product class that handles the representation of products in program Is serializable and cloneable
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Product

      public Product​(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String ID, java.lang.String type, double basePrice, double sellPrice, int quantity, int numberSold)
      Default constructor for products which requires input of following parameters
      Parameters:
      name - name of the product
      ID - id of product
      type - type of product
      basePrice - base price of product
      sellPrice - sell price of product
      quantity - quantity of product
      numberSold - number of products sold

      public boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
      function to test for the equality of two products
      Overrides:
      equals in class java.lang.Object
      Parameters:
      o - the other product to compare to
